channel.title: Vercel Deployment issue - There are lots of console issue
channel.description:
Hi Guys,
I was successfully deploy my very first website at vercel. However, I got this console issues. Could you please advise how to fix those issues? my website is https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com/ I just migrated it from wp to frontity.
``` Access to fetch at 'https://panlasangpinoyrecipe.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?_embed=true&slug=about-us' from origin 'https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com' has been blocked by CORS policy: The 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header has a value 'http://localhost:3000' that is not equal to the supplied origin. Have the server send the header with a valid value, or, if an opaque response serves your needs, set the request's mode to 'no-cors' to fetch the resource with CORS disabled. ```
Thanks

item.title: Vercel Deployment issue - There are lots of console issue
item.dc:creator: codepinoys
item.description:
Hi Guys,

I was successfully deploy my very first website at vercel. However, I got this console issues. Could you please advise how to fix those issues? my website is https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com/ I just migrated it from wp to frontity.

Access to fetch at 'https://panlasangpinoyrecipe.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?_embed=true&slug=about-us' from origin 'https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com' has been blocked by CORS policy: The 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header has a value 'http://localhost:3000' that is not equal to the supplied origin. Have the server send the header with a valid value, or, if an opaque response serves your needs, set the request's mode to 'no-cors' to fetch the resource with CORS disabled.

Thanks

Read full topic
item.source: Vercel Deployment issue - There are lots of console issue
